description_long: This object is a stylized, mounted rifle or turret with a robust, industrial design, featuring a large cylindrical barrel that tapers to a reddish-orange muzzle. The main body is predominantly yellow with green structural supports and a wide, stable base, suggesting it is designed for stationary use. The barrel is reinforced with metallic bands and has a few small, rectangular attachments on the top, possibly representing sighting or control modules. The base is angular and broad, colored in a muted yellow with black accents, providing stability and a platform for rotation or elevation adjustment. The rear of the rifle is flat and closed, with a dark central area that may represent a breech or loading port. The overall appearance is utilitarian, with visible wear and a matte finish, suitable for deployment in urban defense or security scenarios.
description: A large, mounted, industrial-style rifle with a yellow cylindrical barrel, green supports, and a wide, angular base. The design is robust and utilitarian, with visible wear and a matte finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, open muzzle with orange and red coloring, flanked by green supports and a broad, angular base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the yellow barrel, the green mounting arms, and the rectangular attachments on top.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat, closed end of the barrel with a dark central area and the symmetrical base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the barrel profile, top attachments, and the structural support details.
